description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named pymnn-linux that runs on push to master, feature branches, and on pull requests to master, but only for paths under pymnn/ and the workflow file itself. The workflow should allow concurrent runs per reference but cancel in-progress jobs for the same reference. In a ubuntu-latest job with read-only repository contents permission, check out the code, install numpy, opencv-python, and torch, then build and test pymnn by running custom scripts in specific directories.
